TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-29-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF RAUL RAMIREZ'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERNCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)&(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 06-07-10 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF'S DEMANDS DUE BY 05-21-10 AND DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE BY 05-28-10; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 06-01-10 @ 9:00AM IN DEPT. 603. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT, NO FILING OF DISCOVERY MOTIONS UNLESS PERMITTED BY THE COURT. PARTIES STIPULATED TO G.O. 140 WITH THE FOLLOWING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SCHEDULE: LAST DATE TO FILE MOTION IS 05-28-10 FOR A HEARING ON 06-07-10 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 220, OPPOSITION DUE BY 06-02-10, AND REPLY DUE BY 06-04-10. THE COURT SET A HEARING REGARDING DISCOVERY ON 05-07-10 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 220 OR BY PHONE. PLAINTIFF TO SET UP THE TELEPHONE CONFERENCE AND EMAIL ALL PARTIES WITH THE INFORMATION. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA/SAJJA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
